tools.name: listEntityRelations
tools.title: List Entity Relations
tools.description: List relation targets attached to a source entity for a given relation field key.

field_key.description: Relation field key registered on the source entity type.

tools.name: attachEntityRelation
tools.title: Attach Entity Relation
tools.description: Attach a target entity to a source entity via a typed relation field. For cardinality=one fields, replaces the existing target.

field_key.description: Relation field key on the source entity type.

tools.name: listEntitiesByRelationTarget
tools.title: List Entities By Relation Target
tools.description: List source entities whose relation field points to a target entity. Pass entity_type_id and one query parameter per relation filter using the form relation_{fieldKey} (e.g. relation_author=5). Multiple relation_{fieldKey} parameters are combined with AND.

entity_type_id.description: Entity type id of records to list.

additionalProperties.description: Relation filter query param. Use key relation_{fieldKey} with the target entity id as value.
